title: Any good compilation of material of the 30th anniversary event
display_title: Any good compilation of material of the 30th anniversary event
wikitext:
[]: Any good compilation of material of the 30th anniversary event?             Quote Post by ClaudioA1992 » Mon Feb 16, 2026 9:28 pm I'd love to see photos and videos of the event. Anyone could take the time to share them with me, please?

[]: Re: Any good compilation of material of the 30th anniversary event?             Quote Post by DTGee » Fri Feb 20, 2026 5:00 pm The event hasn't even started yet, but just keep an eye out of social media. If you want to buy tickets to watch the livestream, they're available here: https://www.abema-global.com/en

[]: Re: Any good compilation of material of the 30th anniversary event?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Feb 22, 2026 12:44 pm Does anybody know if the live cast reading was written by someone at khara? And what it was even about?

[]: Re: Any good compilation of material of the 30th anniversary event?             Quote Post by ClaudioA1992 » Sun Feb 22, 2026 11:20 pm DTGee wrote: The event hasn't even started yet, but just keep an eye out of social media. If you want to buy tickets to watch the livestream, they're available here: https://www.abema-global.com/en

[]: Re: Any good compilation of material of the 30th anniversary event?             Quote Post by DTGee » Mon Feb 23, 2026 12:40 am ClaudioA1992 wrote: I can't buy from my location, does VPN work?

[]: Re: Any good compilation of material of the 30th anniversary event?             Quote Post by ClaudioA1992 » Tue Feb 24, 2026 11:40 am DTGee wrote: ClaudioA1992#946215 wrote: I can't buy from my location, does VPN work?

[]: Re: Any good compilation of material of the 30th anniversary event?             Quote Post by DTGee » Tue Feb 24, 2026 3:23 pm I don't think there are any free VPNs,but all of the major ones offer free trails. There's Nord, Surfshark, Norton, ExpressVPN, etc.

[]: Re: Any good compilation of material of the 30th anniversary event?             Quote Post by ClaudioA1992 » Tue Feb 24, 2026 3:25 pm DTGee wrote: I don't think there are any free VPNs,but all of the major ones offer free trails. There's Nord, Surfshark, Norton, ExpressVPN, etc.

[]: Re: Any good compilation of material of the 30th anniversary event?             Quote Post by DTGee » Tue Feb 24, 2026 3:28 pm There are no official subtitles anywhere.

[]: Re: Any good compilation of material of the 30th anniversary event?             Quote Post by Darth Plato » Mon Mar 09, 2026 9:31 pm I confess I just watched it subtitled in Spanish. I couldn't quite follow, honestly.
